title: astilbe × alba
intro: Astilbe × alba, also known as False Goat's Beard, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Saxifragaceae family. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a popular choice for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Astilbe × alba include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Traditionally, the plant has been used to prepare herbal teas and infusions, as well as being used in salves and ointments to soothe skin irritations and promote healing.
